default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss recent client acquisitions, revenue projections, and team capacity planning.](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several new deals closing (Metadata, Minder, DeepGram), pushing revenue to \~$155k/mo (\~$1.86M ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Team at capacity; urgent need to hire more staff to handle growth](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [New account manager starting soon; evaluating performance of struggling team member](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

## Topics

### New Client Acquisitions

  - [Metadata: CEO investing, making intros; perfect fit (they do paid, we do organic)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Minder: CMO returned, ready to sign after redlines](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [DeepGram: $5k/mo + equity, light engagement (2hrs/week)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Hijan: Wants programmatic content; potential for blog expansion](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Total new MRR: \~$21k (Metadata \~$7k, Minder \~$9k, DeepGram $5k)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Revenue Projections

  - [Current monthly revenue: \~$140k](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [With new clients: \~$155k/mo (\~$1.86M ARR)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - ["Two clients away from $2M ARR"](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### Team Capacity & Hiring

  - [Jimmy: Can handle one more client](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Lucero: Capacity for one more client](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Petite: Hiring more for capacity of two clients](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Sedera: Back-end operations, helping with content workloads](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New account manager starting in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

### Ongoing Team Evaluation

  - [Struggling team member given "last shot" after multiple mistakes](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Decision on their future to be made within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Preference for reliable team members like Andre](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Client Management Challenges

  - [Hijan described as "squirrel on Adderall" - very ADHD, all over the map](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Potential upsell opportunity missed ($5-10k) for graphics on programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Some clients complaining about free services (e.g., website)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Onboard new clients (Metadata, Minder, DeepGram, Hijan)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Continue hiring process to meet growing demand](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Evaluate struggling team member's performance by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Monitor new account manager's integration (starting in \~2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Explore upsell opportunities for graphics/creative work with new clients](https://fathom.video/share/uucsx8QhU-o3MR9dx3UR1AyrLHfrTAQV?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

action_items.description: Onboard new account manager starting within two weeks
Evaluate Mark's performance by the end of next week and potentially terminate his contract if no improvement
